title: Amadeus
description: A versatile and high-performance vanilla modpack | 一个全能的高性能原版整合包
body:
Amadeus is a modpack designed to **enhance the vanilla gameplay experience**, providing better 
performance and an improved survival experience **without altering the game mechanics**.
### ⚡Enhance Performance
- Amadeus includes many optimization mods. With mods like Sodium and Lithium, Amadeus achieved a 357% FPS improvement with only 2GB of running memory. Whether on a modern high-performance PC or on last-generation entry-level devices, Amadeus ensures a smooth experience for you.
![Amadeus(1257fps)-shaders(115fps)-vanilla(354fps)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/636dcd2022a5ff25118d040811dd5abdfb514343.jpeg)



<details>
<summary>Test environment:</summary>

 The same configuration of a machine, idling at the same seed location for 1 minute to record frame rates, repeated three times to obtain an average value.

</details>

### ⚽Improve Experience
- Tweakeroo Litematica Tweakemore Itemscroller Minihud provides a wide range of practical survival improvements.
- Xaero's Minimap Xaero's World Map EMI Jade. provides a wealth of convenient visual content.
- Viafabric makes cross-version gameplay on servers a reality.
### ✨Clean interface
- Simplify GUI while retaining as much information as possible, aiming for a close-to-vanilla game interface.
- Smooth Scrolling Cubes Without Borders to make the gaming experience smoother.
### 🐛Swift Updates
- I will promptly update when I come up with better ideas or when there are significant updates to mods.
 




汉化介绍锐意制作中...
